name: Olive Garden Apple Praline Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Red delicious apples, peeled and diced into 1/4 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Make the crust: Melt butter, stir in crumbs and sugar until blended; press into bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Prepare the apple mix: In a Dutch oven, melt butter over low heat; add brown sugar, apples, cinnamon, nutmeg, and allspice. Simmer until apples are soft but still hold their shape; cool to room temperature.
4. Make the praline topping: Mix dark brown sugar, melted butter, and pecan pieces in a bowl until well incorporated.
5. Prepare the cheesecake filling: In a large bowl, cream together sugar and cream cheese on medium speed until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs one at a time until smooth; add heavy whipping cream and continue beating until thick and creamy. Gently stir in cooled apple mix.
6. Pour filling into prepared pan; spread praline topping over the top.
7. Bake for 1 hour and 20 minutes, or until set. Allow to cool to room temperature before removing sides of the pan. Refrigerate until ready to serve. Garnish with whipped cream.
Source: The Olive Garden.
